description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded edges, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen display on the front. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which has a small notch at the top for sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is made of a smooth, reflective material, likely glass, and includes a vertically-aligned dual camera module in the top left corner, accompanied by a flash. A metallic frame runs along the sides, providing structural integrity and a premium appearance. The device is thin and lightweight, with minimal visible buttons or ports, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall color scheme is a combination of black, gray, and metallic silver, with a prominent brand logo centered on the back.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, glass back, and dual rear cameras. The design is minimalist with metallic accents and a centered brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a notch at the top and no visible buttons.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the dual camera module and flash in the top left corner, as well as the centered brand logo.
description_view_2: Rear-side view emphasizing the smooth glass back, metallic frame, and the protruding dual camera module.
description_view_3: Oblique front view displaying the vibrant screen and the device's thin profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly reflective and distinct against the glass surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with a time of 9:41 at the top, and two icons at the bottom for flashlight and camera. No notifications or additional widgets are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a flash module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the sides: a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge, all slim and elongated.
